questions.body:
Assertion :- The electrostatic field is of conservative nature.

Reason :- The line integral of electrostatic field ∮E⃗.dr⃗ along closed path is always zero.

choices.a: If both Assertion & Reason are True & the Reason is a correct explanation of the Assertion.
choices.b: If both Assertion & Reason are True but Reason is not a correct explanation of the Assertion.
choices.c: If Assertion is True but the Reason is False.
choices.d: If both Assertion & Reason are False.

questions.body: Assertion :- Genes are the units of inheritance. Reason :- They contain the information that is required to express a particular trait in an organism.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- Simply looking at the phenotype of a dominant trait, it is not possible to know the genotype composition. Reason :- Mendel performed reciprocal crosses to know the genotype of dominant organism.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- Multiple alleles can be observed or studies in an organism, when its complete genome is known. Reason :- Multiple alleles is a rare phenomenon.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- Round seeds in pea plant may have large sized or intermediate sized starch grains. Reason :- It is an example of pleiotropy, multiple alleles and incomplete dominance.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- According to Mendel, factors are stable & discrete units that control the expression of traits. Reason :- He could not provide any physical proof for the existence of factors.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- In birds, the females have one Z and one W chromosome, whereas males have a pair of Z-chromosomes besides autosomes. Reason :- In birds, sex of the offsprings is decided by the temperature of surroundings when they are released.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- In human genetics, pedigree study provides a strong tool, which is utilized to trace the inheritance of a specific trait, abnormality or disease. Reason :- The controlled crosses that can be performed in pea plant or some other organisms, are not possible in case of human beings.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- An X-linked recessive trait shows transmission from carrier male to female progeny. Reason :- X-linked recessive trait shows non-criss-cross inheritance.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- Sickle-cell anaemia is caused by the substitution of glutamic acid by valine at the sixth position of the beta globin chain of the haemoglobin molecule. Reason :- It is due to the single base substitution at the sixth codon of the beta globin gene from GUG to GAG.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body: Assertion :- According to Mendelism, contrasting traits did not show any blending. Reason :- Only one of the parental traits was expressed in the F1, while at the F2 stage both the traits were expressed in the proportion of 1 : 1.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body:
Assertion :- The segregation of alleles is a random process and so there is a 50% chance of a gamete containing either allele.

Reason :- By the process of mitosis, the alleles of the parental pair separates from each other & only one allele in transmitted to a gamete.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body:
Assertion :- Dominance is not an autonomous feature of a gene or its product.

Reason :- It depends on gene product or on the particular phenotype that we choose to examine, when more than one phenotype is influenced by the same gene.
questions.subject: biology

questions.body:
Assertion :- On the basis of Punnett square, the F2 generation of dihybrid plant will produce 16 different types of genotypes.

Reason :- In F1 generation plant, there are four genotypes of gametes with a frequency of 25% of total gametes produced.
